description_long: This is a freestanding vertical banner display featuring a printed fabric or vinyl panel stretched between a slim, rectangular metal frame. The front face of the banner showcases a modern advertisement with the word 'Qseg', a large smartphone graphic, and a colorful abstract wave design. The supporting structure consists of two thin, horizontal metal feet at the base, providing stability. The side views reveal the banner's minimal thickness and the simple, unobtrusive support system. The surface of the banner is smooth and likely semi-glossy, designed to attract attention in public or commercial spaces. The overall construction is lightweight, portable, and suitable for temporary or semi-permanent installation.
description: A freestanding vertical banner with a printed advertisement on a smooth, fabric or vinyl panel, supported by a slim metal frame and base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full printed advertisement with 'Qseg', a smartphone image, and colorful graphics.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the thin profile of the banner and the metal support structure at the base.
description_view_2: Front view identical to view 0, highlighting the printed design and overall shape.
description_view_3: Side view identical to view 1, emphasizing the slimness and support feet.
attribute_banner_content: company logo, advertisement text, smartphone image, abstract pattern
